news.title:
Bajaj Auto Credit secures ICRA AAA ratings for Rs 7,750 crore facilities, affirming strong financials.
Bajaj Auto shares traded at Rs 9812.65 on BSE, hitting Rs 9883.25 high and Rs 9695.95 low intraday.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto Credit secures ICRA AAA ratings for Rs 7,750 crore facilities, affirming strong financials.
Bajaj Auto shares traded at Rs 9812.65 on BSE, hitting Rs 9883.25 high and Rs 9695.95 low intraday.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto's Baih BV repays €480M loan, ends Citigroup & Standard Chartered contracts.
Partial payments made to JPMorgan and DBS by Bajaj Auto's Baih BV.
news.summary:

news.title:
Jio Finance invests ₹147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV, with funds for operations.
TCS plans more AI data centres; Wipro appoints Laura Miller; Bajaj Auto loan repaid.
news.summary:

news.title:
KTM AG has fully settled financial obligations to BAIH BV under a facility agreement.
Bajaj Auto Limited is linked as a stakeholder in this transaction.
news.summary:

news.title:
Rising freight costs hike logistics expenses, impacting exporters' margins.
Bajaj Auto faces challenges as major two-wheeler exporter to Africa.
news.summary:

news.title:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.
news.summary:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.

news.title:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.
news.summary:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto Feb'26 sales up 27% YoY; domestic 2-wheelers rose 27%.
Exports 2-wheelers grew 26%; commercial vehicles up 30%; YTD Apr-Feb total growth 9%.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto Feb'26 sales up 27% YoY; domestic 2-wheelers rose 27%.
Exports 2-wheelers grew 26%; commercial vehicles up 30%; YTD Apr-Feb total growth 9%.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto's subsidiary secures €550M refinancing for KTM AG from global banks.
Refinancing replaces €450M debt under a restructuring plan due May 2025.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto's subsidiary secures €550M refinancing for KTM AG from global banks.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto announces an analyst/investor meet on 12 March 2026 in Pune.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared during the meeting.
news.summary:

news.title:
Rajiv Bajaj, MD of Bajaj Auto, highlights EV leadership with strong e-three-wheeler market share.
Plans include scaling up Chetak production, focusing on innovation and global competitiveness.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bajaj Auto expects exports to drive growth, targeting 250,000 units/month in FY27, led by Africa and Latin America recovery.
The company aims to expand in EVs, leveraging PLI, and benefit from India-EU FTA for competitive edge in two-wheelers.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto expects exports to drive growth, targeting 250,000 units/month in FY27, led by Africa and Latin America recovery.
The company aims to expand in EVs, leveraging PLI, and benefit from India-EU FTA for competitive edge in two-wheelers.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto expects strong exports with 2.5 lakh units from April.
RoDTEP reduction will minimally impact Bajaj Auto but affect many exporters.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto expects strong exports with 2.5 lakh units from April.

news.title:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.
news.summary:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings' Dec 2025 net sales rose 133.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 280.6 crore.
Net profit climbed 115.4% Y-o-Y to Rs 180.95 crore; EPS grew to Rs 16.3.
news.summary:

news.title:
Public companies hold a 37% stake in Bajaj Auto, giving them significant influence, while individual investors own 22%.
The top 3 shareholders control over 53% of Bajaj Auto, with insiders holding shares worth 68B, reflecting strong ownership.

news.title:

PAT stands at INR2,503Cr; exports rose 18%, while EVs contribute 25% of domestic revenue.
news.summary:
